General.Name: Kelfred Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Kelfred Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the manufacture and sale of eyewear products in the People's Republic of China, Italy, the United Kingdom, the Netherlands, Hong Kong, France, Japan, Australia, the United States, and internationally. The company produces and sells a range of spectacle frames and sunglasses primarily through original design manufacturing and original equipment manufacturing. It also offers product design and development, raw materials procurement, production, quality control, packaging, and delivery services. In addition, the company provides original brand manufacturing products under the Miga brand name. Further, it is involved in properties holding activities. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Sha Tin, Hong Kong. Kelfred Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Conquer Holding Limited.
General.Address: Block B, New Trade Plaza, Sha Tin, Hong Kong
